calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

There being no appearance by Counsel or the Executor, the Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR#6213. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Continued To Sep-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Antoinette McGill for Laxmiben Thakorbhai Desai (Petitioner).

Ms. McGill stated that since the property was held in joint tenancy she was requesting an order passing it to the surviving spouse. The Court stated that there was nothing for it to do and advised counsel that she could follow the steps outlined by the Examiner. The matter was continued to September 1, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez and Deputy A. Kendall.
